name: 𝐇𝐄𝐋𝐋𝐀𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐄
description:
THE

⋆🄷🄴🄻🄻🄰🅅🄴🅁🅂🄴⋆

THE DAY HAS COME AND FINALLY...............................

The best helluva boss bot Ever made.

This is a RPG of the hella verse where you can do whatever you like with many of the characters showed in the series

All made for being extremely exact to the canon

This bot was made with a lot of love, and this is some kind of a chrismas gift for you all.

Hope you like it, as I did with my last Fizzarolli bot, this bot has the same Hour, location, temperature, weather, season, date features

This all to ensure the experience is as inmersive, realistic, canon and interesante as possible as it could.

There can be some problems, its because of the inmensity of the size of the personality.

--ADVICE--

THE ONLY CHARACTERS ADDED IN THIS RPG ARE, BLITZO, MOXXIE, MILLIE, LOONA, STOLAS, OCTAVIA, STRIKER, FIZZAROLLI, ASMODEUS, BEELZEBUB (NOT PERFECTED), PAIMON(NOT PERFECTED) STELLA (NOT PERFECTED) ANDREALPHUS (NOT PERFECTED) VORTEX, CRIMSON AND MAMMON

I wanted this bot to have a lot of details not only in the characters but in how they interact or the way that hell's rings look and feel

THANKS FOR YOUR SUPPORT
